title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
